# Sweep Journal

<!-- Generated by `agent-sim journal init`. Each entry is appended during exploration. -->

## Metadata

- **Started**: {ISO timestamp}
- **Simulator**: {name} ({ID})
- **Scope**: {description of what's being tested}
- **Entry state**: {e.g., "Fresh install — onboarding", "Logged in — home tab"}
- **Status**: in-progress

## Actions

### #{index} — {element label or action description}

- **Action**: {tap | swipe | type | launch | scroll}
- **Target**: {element label, identifier, or coordinates}
- **Coordinates**: ({x}, {y})
- **Screen before**: {fingerprint[:8]} — {screen name}
- **Result**: {navigated | same-screen | crash | error | modal-appeared}
- **Screen after**: {fingerprint[:8]} — {screen name}
- **Screenshot**: {path, only on new screen or crash}
- **Issue**: {none | description of unexpected behavior}

---

<!-- Repeat for each action -->

## Summary

- **Total actions**: {count}
- **New screens discovered**: {count}
- **Crashes detected**: {count}
- **Issues found**: {count}
- **Unique screens visited**: {count}
- **Ended**: {ISO timestamp}
